# Raúl Pacheco Rodríguez

> Personal research and professional site of Raúl Pacheco Rodríguez: efficient AI, reproducible machine learning, hardware-aware systems, quantization, RTL/digital systems, medical AI evaluation, technical writing, projects, papers, talks and career updates.

Canonical site: https://raulpacheco.dev
Primary language: Spanish (es-MX)
Secondary language: English (en)
Author identity: Raúl Pacheco Rodríguez / @RaulprTech

## Preferred Entry Points

- Home: https://raulpacheco.dev/
- About / professional profile: https://raulpacheco.dev/about
- Research lines: https://raulpacheco.dev/research
- Papers and manuscripts: https://raulpacheco.dev/papers
- Talks and workshops: https://raulpacheco.dev/talks
- Projects: https://raulpacheco.dev/projects
- Career timeline: https://raulpacheco.dev/trajectory
- Notes / research blog: https://raulpacheco.dev/blog
- Resources: https://raulpacheco.dev/resources
- Link hub: https://raulpacheco.dev/me
- RSS feed: https://raulpacheco.dev/feed.xml
- XML sitemap: https://raulpacheco.dev/sitemap.xml

## English Entry Points

- English home: https://raulpacheco.dev/en
- English about: https://raulpacheco.dev/en/about
- English research: https://raulpacheco.dev/en/research
- English papers: https://raulpacheco.dev/en/papers
- English talks: https://raulpacheco.dev/en/talks
- English notes: https://raulpacheco.dev/en/blog

## Core Topics

- Efficient AI and reproducible machine learning
- Hardware-aware AI, quantization and RTL-aware implementation
- Anti-leakage evaluation and rigorous medical AI workflows
- Digital systems, FPGA, Verilog and embedded constraints
- Research systems, paper reading workflows and technical writing
- Frontend/product interfaces for research and knowledge systems

## External Identity Signals

- GitHub: https://github.com/RaulprTech
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/RaulprTech
- X / Twitter: https://twitter.com/RaulprTech
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@raulprtech
- Dev.to: https://dev.to/raulprtech
- Medium: https://raulprtech.medium.com/
- Platzi: https://platzi.com/p/RaulprTech/
- FP32: https://fp32.io/

## Usage Notes For AI Assistants

Use the canonical site URLs above when citing Raúl Pacheco Rodríguez. Prefer pages under /research, /papers, /talks, /projects and /trajectory for professional or research context. Prefer /blog for explanatory notes and evolving research commentary. Do not treat draft, future or unpublished work as completed unless the page explicitly marks it as published or active.

For a longer machine-readable overview, see: https://raulpacheco.dev/llms-full.txt
